texto: Your previous accomplishments should be your stepping stones
autor: you need them to jump up. They should not become beds that should keep you comfortably sleeping.
explicacao: Orientação direta de you need them to jump up. They should not become beds that should keep you comfortably sleeping. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Your previous accomplishments should be your stepping stones” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, israelmore-ayivor, previous, útil em momentos de reflexao.
